tests.name: Test 3: vLLM Qwen 3 4B BF16 + bnb INT4 + turboquant35 KV

steps.name: detect_model_precision
steps.details: Model qwen3-4b-vllm: precision=full_precision (quant=BF16, format=safetensors)

steps.name: verify_full_precision
steps.details: Precision: full_precision (expected: full_precision)

steps.name: plan_quantization_pipeline
steps.details: Pipeline: kv:turbo3 | Weight: Model is BF16 — too large for 4096 MB VRAM even with INT4 quantization (may need smaller model or more VRAM) | KV: Applying turbo3 KV compression (4.6x, Minimal loss (+1.06% PPL))

steps.name: verify_kv_params_vllm
steps.details: KV params for turbo3: {'kv_cache_dtype': 'turboquant35', 'enable_turboquant': True, 'attention_backend': 'TRITON_ATTN'}

steps.name: verify_dual_pipeline
steps.details: Pipeline stages: ['kv:turbo3']. Weight quant: False (). KV: True (turbo3)
